title: Perseus with the Head of Medusa by Benvenuto Cellini
highlights: Florentine Politics and Cellini’s Place on Piazza della Signoria As with most famous artworks, Perseus with the Head of Medusa is surrounded by politics. It was commissioned by the great Cosimo I de’ Medici in 1545, a great artistic patron and advocate of culture, science, and philosophy.
